response.overview: Studio 2000's latest jolt and juice-filled release is Men In Exile, an erotic, fantasy feast featuring a sizzling cast headed by Jake Hart, Drew Larson, and Matt Spencer. This has been an extraordinary year for Studio 2000, with one hit after another being cranked out just for you. Men In Exile continues this winning streak, delivering a most magnificent cast of cocky cumsters. Just to kick up the action that extra notch, Men In Exile is directed by both John Travis and Scott Masters, living legends in the world of male erotica. These two indeed double your pleasure and double your fun.
response.title: Men in Exile
